Plaintiffs Motion Requesting A Default Judgment Against Defendant Abobaker M Alghem
Off Calendar Dec-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Abobaker M. Alghem.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616. Email: nrodich@sftc.org.

Nikolaus Reed, Esq. of the Law Office of Nikolaus W. Reed appeared for plaintiff.
Plaintiff Alexander M. Upchurch was present, placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs appeared via ZOOM Video Conference for today's proceedings
No appearance by defendant Abobaker M. Alghem.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury (Motor Vehicle Related) was filed on September 4, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages on defendant Abobaker M. Alghem occurred on September 16, 2019 and was effectuated on September 27, 2019.
Default was entered as to defendant Abobaker M. Alghem on November 12, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today via Oral Motion, counsel to file DOE dismissal forthwith.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alexander M. Upchurch, and against the defaulted defendant Abobaker M. Alghem, as follows:

General Damages - $100,000.00.
Costs - $249.85.
Total - $100.249.85.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiffs Motion Requesting A Default Judgment Against Defendant Abobaker M Alghem
